InstanceRefreshes.StatusReason: Step 2 of 4: replacing 4 instances in us-east-1a

_note_for_player: Notice: InstanceWarmup is 0. This is a critical setting in Instance Refresh: it tells the refresh how long to wait after a new instance joins before considering it ready and proceeding to the next batch. With InstanceWarmup=0, the refresh proceeds as soon as the instance is launched, not after it is healthy. Combined with MinHealthyPercentage=66 (allowing 34% to be down at once), the deploy can be at any moment with 4 instances per AZ all in their unhealthy launch window simultaneously.
